Powered by passionate people, we bring the right teams with the right skills together to turn problems into solutions and challenges into moments of ingenuity.<br><br>As an office <strong>Cleaner</strong>, you will ensure the over-all cleanliness of our facilities to the highest level.<br><br><strong>Schedule:</strong> Sunday, Monday, Tuesday 4:30pm-1:00am and Friday, Saturday 5:30pm-2:00am<br><br><strong>Your work will include:<br><br></strong><ul><li>Maintaining the floors, washrooms and garbage bins of the facility</li><li>Cleaning and sanitizing that includes washrooms, common and play areas</li><li>Replenishing any used or missing supplies (toilet rolls, hand towels, hand soap)</li><li>Dusting all visible surfaces within reach which includes phone booths, counter tops, pillars, lighting fixtures, window ledges. <br><br></li></ul>Qualifications<br><br><strong>WHO ARE WE LOOKING FOR?<br><br></strong><ul><li>A great attitude!</li><li>Floor care experience an asset (able to scrub, buff and polish floors)</li><li>A minimum of 6 months' cleaning experience </li><li>Must be comfortable standing for a long period of time</li><li>Must be comfortable using cleaning products </li><li>Able to communicate with supervisor, Client and general public</li><li>Able to lift up to 25 lbs</li><li>Must be 19 years or older</li><li>A clear criminal background check is required for this role. </li><li>Must have own transportation. <br><br></li></ul>Additional Information<br><br><strong>WHATâS IN IT FOR YOU?<br><br></strong><ul><li>Be part of an industry that's more important than ever!</li><li>Career advancement opportunities. </li><li>Whereas other companies are downsizing, we are growing!</li><li>Be #1 on day 1 by joining an industry leader. <br><br></li></ul>Dexterra Group is an equal opportunity employer committed to diversity and inclusion. We are pleased to consider all qualified applicants for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, age, disability, protected veteransâ status, Indigenous status, or any other legally protected factors.
